query: Could you suggest a 5-day travel itinerary for 2, leaving from Charlotte and visiting 2 cities in Wisconsin from March 18th to March 22nd, 2022? Our travel budget is set at $2,500. We will be traveling with children under 10, so our accommodations must be child-friendly and provide private rooms. Kindly ensure no flights are involved in the transportation planning.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Charlotte to Marquette, duration: 13 hours 1 min, distance: 1,371 km, cost: 68
plan.accommodation: Huge Private Room Near Prospect Park, Marquette

plan.attraction: Presque Isle Park; Upper Peninsula Children's Museum; Marquette Harbor Lighthouse;
plan.accommodation: Huge Private Room Near Prospect Park, Marquette

plan.attraction: Marquette Maritime Museum; Marquette Regional History Center; Ellwood A Mattson Lower Harbor Park;
